nasb.text: Uzziah was the father of Jotham, Jotham the father of Ahaz, and Ahaz the father of Hezekiah.

esv.text: and Uzziah the father of Jotham, and Jotham the father of Ahaz, and Ahaz the father of Hezekiah,

cnv.text: 烏西雅生約坦，約坦生亞哈斯，亞哈斯生希西家，

ccb.text: 乌西雅生约坦， 约坦生亚哈斯， 亚哈斯生希西迦，

csbs.text: 乌西亚生约坦， 约坦生亚哈斯， 亚哈斯生希西家，
